title: Starry Speed + Look & Feel
description:
A pack I made for for performance, balanced by adding a curated list of visual and convenience mods that didn't slow down anything on top of that. 

Designed to be able to run with vanilla minecraft, singleplayer or multiplayer, no server support needed.
body:
This pack was primarily made to be the pack I personally use to play vanilla minecraft in the highest fidelity possible, while running better than vanilla, and also respecting the original aesthetic of the game. Any visual improvements added as a requirement had to be solid enough not to significantly lower fps, which meant some things I would like to be in here didn't make the cut due to poor optimization, or bad compatibility with the base set of mods.

This pack is a good pick for you if you:

> Are looking for something that goes a bit further than the popular optimization and visual packs available, notably Fabulously Optimized.

> Want a a pack that doesn't violate the core design and aesthetic concepts of the base game as often as possible.

> Want a pack that carefully adds a few much needed convenience features but ensures that they don't break the game or alter pacing negatively (notably inventory sorting and a barebones world map).

> Want something that runs smooth on most hardware and has the ability to be tuned up or down without much trouble.

> A pack made with guaranteed optimization for Mac computers in mind, as it was developed on a Mac.

Thank you for checking out my pack!
